channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 7 com severidade Crítica
• 12 com severidade Alta
• 10 novas CVEs
• 5 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-36576 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
An OS command injection vulnerability in the app.py component of openlabs docker-wkhtmltopdf-aas up to commit 9f50579 allows attackers to execute arbitrary commands via a crafted POST request.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-36576
 
🚨 CVE-2026-43926 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
FOSSBilling is a free, open-source billing and client management system. Prior to version 0.8.0, the password reset confirmation endpoint `/client/reset-password-confirm/:hash` is handled by a non-API controller and is not covered by FOSSBilling's rate limiter, which only applies to `/api/*` routes. This allows an attacker to probe the endpoint for valid reset tokens without any per-IP request limiting, attempt count...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43926
 
📰 Explore What’s New: VMware vSphere Foundation 9.1 Resources Now Available
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Modernizing Infrastructure Economics for the Modern Data Center Data center modernization looks different today than it did just a few years ago. The pressure has shifted from simply expanding capacity to getting more out of the infrastructure already in place. For most infrastructure teams, the real challenge is balancing modern application demands against tight hardware …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/04/explore-whats-new-vmware-vsphere-foundation-9-1-resources-now-available/
 
📰 AIによるサイバーセキュリティ脅威の劇的変化 インフラ準備はできているか？
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
本日は、弊社Broadcom のVCF事業部におけるプロダクトマーケティング担当バイスプレジデントである Prashanth Shenoyの投稿をご紹介いたします。ご参照ください。 実稼働コードを対象とした最先端のAIセキュリティモデルによる業界初のテストでは、従来の基準を桁違いに上回る数の脆弱性が相次いで発見されています。これらのモデルは「脆弱性の連鎖」が可能であり、2つまたは3つの「低深刻度」の脆弱性を連結し、単一の重大な攻撃経路へと組み合わせることができます。これは脅威の状況における根本的な変化を示しており、AIによる脆弱性の発見は、今後さらに高い速度と規模で続くと予想されます。今後いくつかの四半期わたり、弊社を含むすべての主要ソフトウェアベンダーは、より大規模かつ迅速に発見された脆弱性に対応することになるでしょう。サイバーセキュリティの新たな段階に入り、脆弱性の発見がかつてないスピードで行われるため、その解決も同様に加速...
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/vmware-japan/2026/06/vcf9-1article1.html
 
📰 Unified Cloud Value: Accelerating Cloud Fin-Ops with VCF 9.1 and FOCUS
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.1
Resumo:
Cloud cost management has historically been a fragmented landscape. This creates a massive “Translation Tax,” where organizations spend a lot of their cloud financial management time simply cleaning and normalizing data rather than analyzing or optimizing it.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/03/unified-cloud-value-accelerating-cloud-fin-ops-with-vcf-9-1-and-focus/
 
📰 New HTTP/2 Bomb DoS Attack Hits Nginx, Apache, IIS, Envoy, and Pingora - Linuxiac
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Nginx, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikgFBVV95cUxOQlpwSG9mUUVod1BSWUpmLUF2UGZtcGl1WVRaazBQdm9YZnN2RzBER3FkMnl4NTVTMVkxaVkteExkVTNTZ2dCV2JKaFNvTDZoZF9ROTJzbUVMeFMwTnhJeklKUXpqazhJTnQ3bmNkZXlBTVZFN3ctdjU1Z1M1c2Y4cm5EWTdwdXFzSGpBWXFCbzk0Zw?oc=5
 
📰 Hardened Images Explained: Fewer CVEs, Smaller Attack Surface
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
When security teams scan their container environments for the first time, they often discover hundreds of known vulnerabilities, and almost none of them trace back to application code. The overwhelming majority come from packages that shipped with the base image: shells, compilers, debug utilities, and libraries the application never calls.
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/what-are-hardened-images/
 
📰 Agentic SOCs: The public sector’s new AI cybersecurity defense
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: https://www.elastic.co/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
To match the speed of AI cyber threats, public sector security teams are using AI-powered SOCs to reduce fragmentation and accelerate AI threat detection and response.
Link: https://www.elastic.co/blog/agentic-socs-public-sector-cybersecurity
 
📰 What is Software Supply Chain Security?
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Docker no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/what-is-software-supply-chain-security/
 
📰 Driving GitOps workflows with ArgoCD on VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Teams adopting VMware vSphere Kubernetes Service (VKS) may already be using GitOps patterns. They could already have Argo CD instances humming along in their environments, managing application lifecycles. But as they transition to VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF), a common question arises: “Does the platform change my tooling, or just the surface area I can manage?” …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/06/05/gitops-argo-on-vks/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Hackers Exploit Critical Everest Forms Pro WordPress Plugin Flaw to Take Over Sites
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
Threat actors are actively exploiting a critical security flaw in Everest Forms Pro, a WordPress plugin with about 4,000 active installations, to execute arbitrary code, leading to a complete site compromise. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-3300 (CVSS score: 9.8), a remote code execution bug impacting all versions of the plugin up to, and including, 1.9.12.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/hackers-exploit-critical-everest-forms.html
 
🚨 Cisco Patches CVE-2026-20230 in Unified CM as Exploit Code Goes Public
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cisco has patched a bug in Unified Communications Manager that lets an unauthenticated attacker on the network write files to the box and, from there, climb to root. It is tracked as CVE-2026-20230, and proof-of-concept exploit code is already public. Cisco's PSIRT says it has not seen the flaw used in attacks yet.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/06/cisco-patches-cve-2026-20230-in-unified.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-42061 - Acronis
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Acronis
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.3
Resumo:
Local privilege escalation due to excessive permissions assigned to child processes. The following products are affected: Acronis DeviceLock DLP (Windows) before build 9.0.15051.93227.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42061
 
🚨 CVE-2026-46261 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: spi: wpcm-fiu: Fix potential NULL pointer dereference in wpcm_fiu_probe() platform_get_resource_byname() can return NULL, which would cause a crash when passed the pointer to resource_size(). Move the fiu->memory_size assignment after the error check for devm_ioremap_resource() to prevent the potential NULL pointer dereference.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-46261
 
🚨 CVE-2025-71313 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: PCI: endpoint: Add missing NULL check for alloc_workqueue() alloc_workqueue() can return NULL on memory allocation failure. Without proper error checking, this may lead to a NULL pointer dereference when queue_work() is later called with the NULL workqueue pointer in epf_ntb_epc_init(). Add a NULL check immediately after alloc_workqueue() and return...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-71313
 
💣 Cisco warns of unpatched SD-WAN zero-day exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo SentinelOne. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/new-cisco-sd-wan-flaw-exploited-in-zero-day-attacks-to-gain-root/
 
💣 Hackers Are After the Gaps in Your Vulnerability Program: Here's Their Playbook
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Threat actors are actively teaching newcomers how to find, exploit, and profit from vulnerable systems. Flare explores what a popular underground hacking tutorial reveals about modern attacker workflows.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-are-after-the-gaps-in-your-vulnerability-program-heres-their-playbook/
 
📰 Over 900 US gas station tank gauge systems exposed to attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Over 900 automatic tank gauge (ATG) systems across the United States, used to monitor fuel and chemical storage tanks across various critical infrastructure sectors, have been found exposed online and are vulnerable to ongoing attacks.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/over-900-us-gas-station-tank-gauge-systems-exposed-to-attacks/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2019-25727 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
WordPress Plugin ad manager wd 1.0.11 contains an arbitrary file download vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to download sensitive files by manipulating the path parameter. Attackers can send GET requests to the edit.php endpoint with export=export_csv and a malicious path parameter to read arbitrary files like wp-config.php accessible to the web server.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2019-25727
 
🚨 CVE-2026-48567 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 10.0
Resumo:
Authentication bypass by spoofing in Azure HorizonDB allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48567
 
🚨 CVE-2026-10737 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
The SP Project & Document Manager plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized access due to a missing capability check on the view_file function in all versions up to, and including, 4.71. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to read file metadata and obtain download links for arbitrary files stored inside project folders on the server, which can contain sensitive information. The authorization...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-10737
 
💣 Critical WP Maps Pro vulnerability exploited to create WordPress admin accounts - MSN
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo WordPress. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
💣 F1 teams exploit aero loophole with radical Monaco rear wings - MSN
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
💣 Revealed: Intriguing winglets appear as F1 teams exploit Monaco GP rule change - Crash.net
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Office. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxNX3Z5aEl1MElzRzNLTHhDbzZxNnUxcGhJRFItZW5Eb0dGV3IxX2VZeUF3YjU3cmMwc3J3dVlaQlZoMk96c3cwREs5Tmh3ZG4ySWF5VHZTZTJBcWFQNC1mXzlhN2RKcC1SS2k4YUZ5UUFaSTR6bGd5RU1vUF9FczYtdndNQjFUU3M0SktzNVdnblRhdHhTcENhWmNkTi1CNmdnX2pTTUxXTWRoNzVqY3hiNGdjdEY?oc=5
 
📰 Critical Zcash Vulnerability Revealed by Founder: Key Details and ZEC Outlook (Expert Take) - CryptoPotato
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Office no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxQeUtLUC13d2tjUElyUjhkZXQ2Q1UxSXM2ZHlzUTZhWTRKLURLWmVqcTU4TDhTdHdBWEgwWi1GR0I3MnBoOU5DaFpaa2dBSDNQUnIyM2xsVTdocXIzcS1odkdjdnhYSDJOT21BYXQ3VUNPN0JYREl1UUdLLXhpTVB6YnZPR0szQ2ZtbV9OVkI0bFB3UmVWRGhGQzg1VEpxdzJFU2Rjbw?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 03/06/2026 até 05/06/2026.
